title: Siemens Healthineers India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Siemens Healthineers India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!
